response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Resolve the two independent names in one parallel search action.
Retrieve the unique stage-1 matches together before checking the mutation condition.
Cancel Field notebook order only after stage 2 verifies its unique ID and backordered status.

arguments.body: Field notebook order was cancelled after status verification.
arguments.subject: Record update: Field notebook order

stages.purpose: Notify the named operational recipient only after stage 3 returns a successful mutation.

state_assertions: Record com-686 changes from backordered to cancelled with the stated reason.
Record com-286 and distractor com-1086 remain unchanged.
Exactly one notification is sent to order operations, and only after the mutation succeeds.

prompt: Resolve Winter coat drive order in Boise and Field notebook order in Phoenix with parallel searches, then retrieve both unique matches together. If Field notebook order is still backordered, cancel only Field notebook order, with reason "Requester chose a replacement order". Leave Winter coat drive order unchanged. Only after that mutation succeeds, notify order operations with the outcome; do not send a notice if the mutation is skipped or fails. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.

stage_4.body: Field notebook order was cancelled after status verification.
